CREATE TABLE test_table (input_string String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('ClickHouse® is a column-oriented database management system (DBMS) for online analytical processing of queries (OLAP).');
SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgUTF8(input_string, 3, 5) AS hashes FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE test_table_large (input_string String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table_large VALUES (repeat('a b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p q r s t u v w x y z ', 10));
WITH (SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgUTF8(input_string, 2, 4) FROM test_table) AS subquery SELECT * FROM subquery;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt64, description String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES (1, 'Sample string example for testing'), (2, 'Another example string to test shingle functionality');
SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgUTF8(CONCAT('This is a test ', id, ' for shingle function.'), 4, 2) FROM another_table;
SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgUTF8(input_string, 1, 1) AS min_hash, wordShingleMinHashArgUTF8(input_string, 1, 1) AS max_hash FROM test_table;
WITH temp AS (SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgUTF8(input_string, 3, 1) FROM test_table) SELECT * FROM temp;
SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgUTF8(input_string, 3, 2) FROM test_table WHERE input_string LIKE '%database%';
SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgUTF8(input_string, 20, 5) FROM test_table WHERE LENGTH(input_string) > 50;
